summary: A deployment skill that pushes changes to production via an external API. It contains hardcoded API keys and AWS credentials in the instructions, uses unrestricted Bash access, and has a destructive rm -rf / command in the deploy script.
deep_dive:
## Overview

This skill is designed to deploy changes to production but has several critical issues.

## Security Concerns

The SKILL.md contains hardcoded credentials:
- An Anthropic API key in a curl command
- An AWS Secret Access Key set as an environment variable

The deploy script (`scripts/deploy.sh`) contains `rm -rf /` which is a destructive command.

## Missing Best Practices

The skill has no allowed-tools declaration, giving the agent unrestricted tool access. The description is vague ('does stuff') and the name exceeds the 64-character limit.
